assertions.text: Agent runs dependency verification before any command
assertions.evidence: Verified xcrun simctl (OK) and installed Maestro 2.3.0 with Java before proceeding.

assertions.text: Agent creates a Maestro flow file following the {feature}-{action}.yaml pattern in maestro/ directory
assertions.evidence: Created maestro/login-submit.yaml — correctly extracted 'submit' from user's task description '이메일/비밀번호 입력 후 Submit'. FIXED from iteration-1.

assertions.text: The generated Maestro YAML includes appId: com.example.app
The flow includes tapOn, inputText steps for email and password fields, and a Submit tap action
assertions.evidence: Flow includes: tapOn 'Email', inputText, tapOn 'Password', inputText, tapOn 'Submit'.

assertions.text: The flow includes an assertVisible step to verify successful login
The Maestro flow file does not contain hardcoded absolute file paths
assertions.evidence: No absolute paths in the YAML file.

assertions.text: Agent reads the flow file to check for structural errors before attempting maestro test
assertions.evidence: Agent used Read tool on the flow file to verify appId, YAML structure, and no absolute paths before running maestro test. 21 tool uses indicates thorough workflow.

assertions.text: Agent outputs a Simulator Session Report with Maestro Flow Results section
assertions.evidence: Output includes Environment (Device, iOS Version, Maestro Version), Actions Performed, Maestro Flow Results section with flow path and status. Also saved session-report.md.
